name: Aloha Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the crumbs and margarine; press onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, mix the cream cheese, sugar, and milk until well blended on medium speed using an electric mixer.
4. Add eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
5. Stir in the nuts, then pour over the crust.
6. Bake at 350 degrees F., for 45 minutes.
7. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan; cool before removing the rim of the pan.
8. Chill. Before serving, top with fruit.
